popularStory.headline: History of Edmund Stafford (1272-1308)
popularStory.description:
Edmund de Stafford, 1st Baron Stafford, was the son of Nicholas de Stafford, who was summoned to parliament by writ on 6 February 1299 by King Edward I.

The origins of the Stafford family

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford於1272年7月15日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾克里夫頓 霍爾時，他的父親Nicholas de Stafford26歲，母親Eleanor de Clinton22歲。他於1298年之前與Margaret Basset在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年8月12日在英國斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾享年36歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford于1272年7月15日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾克里夫頓 霍爾时，他的父亲Nicholas de Stafford26岁，母亲Eleanor de Clinton22岁。他于1298年之前与Margaret Basset在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年8月12日在英国斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾享年36岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford was born on 15 July 1272, in Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Stafford, was 26 and his mother, Eleanor de Clinton, was 22. He married Margaret Basset before 1298, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 August 1308, in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford est né le 15 juillet 1272, à Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Stafford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Clinton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Basset avant 1298, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1308, à Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.Clifton, Staffordshire, England: Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford am 15. Juli 1272 in Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Stafford 26 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Clinton 22. Er hat vor 1298 in Staffordshire, England Margaret Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1308 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Basset prima del 1298, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1308, nel Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Staffordが1272年7月15日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン ハルで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Staffordは26歳，母Eleanor de Clintonは22歳であった。1298年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでMargaret Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年8月12日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン カンプヴィルで36歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford(이)가 1272년 7월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Stafford(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Clinton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1298년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Margaret Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 8월 12일 영국 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 캠p빌에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford nasceu em 15 de julho de 1272, em Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Stafford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Clinton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Basset antes 1298, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1308, em Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford родился 15 июля 1272 г. в местности клифтон холл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Stafford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Clinton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Basset перед 1298 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1308 г. в местности клифтон кампвилл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия.
